label: The Vault Heist
subject: Binary search (code)
bossHook: Sixteen vaults, one holds the loot, and you get four tries. Split the row in half every time and the safe number can't hide.

vocab.hint: Crack a vault to see if the target is higher or lower — then always split what's LEFT in half.

first-cut.title: The First Cut
first-cut.hook: Eight vaults, sorted low to high. Don't start at the end — crack the MIDDLE one first. It tells you which half the target hides in.
first-cut.winText: One cut down the middle, then the middle of what was left. That halving is the whole trick behind binary search.

halving.title: Cut It in Half
halving.hook: Twelve vaults now. Each crack should throw away HALF of what's left — not shuffle along one at a time.
halving.winText: You threw away half the vaults with every crack — twelve narrowed to one in a handful of tries. That's logarithmic speed.

failText.not-halving: You found it, but you crept along one vault at a time. Crack the MIDDLE of the remaining range each try and it collapses in half every step.

trust-clues.title: Trust the Clues
trust-clues.hook: After a crack, a 'higher/lower' clue rules out a whole side of the row (it dims). Never re-check a ruled-out vault.
trust-clues.winText: You believed the clues and never re-opened a dimmed vault. Every probe should live inside the range the feedback leaves alive.

failText.ignored-feedback: You cracked a vault the clues had already ruled out — a wasted try. Once a side is dimmed, the target CANNOT be there. Stay inside the live range.

boss-vault.title: BOSS · The Grand Vault
boss-vault.hook: Sixteen vaults. Four tries. No margin. Middle, then middle, then middle — perfect binary search or nothing.
boss-vault.winText: Sixteen down to one in four clean cuts. That's a flawless binary search — heist complete.

failText.not-halving: Too many tries — you didn't halve hard enough. Sixteen vaults needs only four perfect cuts.
failText.ignored-feedback: You opened a ruled-out vault under pressure. Trust every clue — it's what makes four tries enough.

narrow-drill.title: SIDE-QUEST · Narrow It Down
narrow-drill.hook: Let's drill ONE reflex until it's automatic: after every crack, jump to the MIDDLE of whatever's still lit. Eight vaults, go.
narrow-drill.winText: Middle, middle, middle — you cut the range in half every single time. That reflex IS binary search.
